description: Database schema enhancements: Record ID tracking (PENG-016), assignment audit trail, ID sequences table

steps.description: Apply database migrations for record ID system and assignment audit
steps.notes: Must be applied in order. Run via phpMyAdmin or SSH wp-cli

steps.expected: Columns: id, request_id, record_id, assigned_to, assigned_by visible
Table exists with sequence tracking rows

steps.notes: Enables automatic record ID generation on approval

features.title: Record ID Database Schema (PENG-001 v2.0)
features.description: Add request_id and record_id columns for PRSN/CMPY tracking system
features.notes: request_id = USRQ-YYMMDD-NNNN (on submission), record_id = PRSN/CMPY-YYMMDD-NNNN (on approval)

features.title: ID Sequences Table
features.description: Create td_id_sequences table for managing record ID counters
features.notes: Tracks PRSN, CMPY, USRQ sequence numbers by date

features.title: Assignment Audit Trail
features.description: Add assigned_by column to track who assigned requests

features.title: Record ID Generator (Code)
features.description: Deploy record-id-generator.php mu-plugin for automatic ID generation
features.notes: Already committed but not yet deployed to production

steps.command: wp db query 'SELECT request_id FROM td_user_data_change_requests LIMIT 1;' --allow-root
wp db query 'SELECT record_id FROM td_user_data_change_requests LIMIT 1;' --allow-root
wp db query 'SELECT assigned_by FROM td_user_data_change_requests LIMIT 1;' --allow-root
wp db query 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM td_id_sequences;' --allow-root
Approve a test request → Check record_id is generated (PRSN-YYMMDD-NNNN format)
ALTER TABLE td_user_data_change_requests DROP COLUMN request_id, DROP COLUMN record_id, DROP COLUMN assigned_by;
